methodsAttempted.query: site:muni.cz AI tools personal data Masaryk University students teachers external tools
methodsAttempted.notes: Follow-up official-domain search found the IT services Microsoft Copilot page and a CSIRT-MU DeepSeek warning with data-security guidance.
robots.txt was checked for www.muni.cz, kvalita.muni.cz, it.muni.cz, and csirt.muni.cz. The selected public pages were not disallowed for User-agent: *.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found Masaryk University's central AI-in-teaching statement, voluntary education recommendations, IT guidance for Microsoft Copilot and other AI tools, and a CSIRT-MU warning about DeepSeek. No central binding AI policy was found in this run; claims are scoped to official recommendations, service availability, and security warnings.

artifacts.title: Masaryk University AI Policy Source Review
artifacts.summary: Masaryk University publishes a central AI-in-teaching statement and voluntary recommendations for AI use in fulfilling study requirements. The official guidance supports AI as an auxiliary study tool, emphasizes transparency and responsibility, and asks teachers to set clear conditions for AI use. Official IT services also document Microsoft Copilot Chat availability with enterprise data protection after university login, while CSIRT-MU warns against DeepSeek products. This run did not find a central binding AI policy; claims are scoped to the official statement, recommendations, IT service guidance, and security warning.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
No central binding AI policy was identified in this run; source-status language should not be promoted as a binding policy conclusion.
Faculty-library, research-publication, and event/news results were rejected or skipped when more central official sources were available.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
